rewritten_requirements: The system shall require the user to provide their details and create an account before they can join as a seller.
The system shall allow the seller to sign in and access their workspace after completing registration and verification.
The system shall enable the seller to add new products to the marketplace.
The system shall allow the seller to promote existing products on the platform.
The system shall enable the seller to communicate with customers through the platform.
The system shall allow the seller to leave the platform at any time, leading to logging out.
The system shall require the customer to sign in and access their personal dashboard upon joining.
The system shall allow the customer to explore products on the platform.
The system shall enable the customer to search and view available products during browsing.
The system shall allow the customer to either stop browsing or proceed with a purchase after viewing products.
The system shall add the selected product to the customer's cart and allow them to proceed to checkout if they decide to make a purchase.
The system shall handle payment during the checkout process.
The system shall allow the customer to communicate with a seller during their session.
The system shall enable the customer to report a seller if needed, based on previous interactions.
The system shall allow the customer to rate and review products after receiving them.
The system shall allow both the seller and the customer to log out by choosing to leave the platform at any time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user must create an account by providing their details before joining as a seller.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the person joins as a seller, they first create an account by providing their details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After completing registration and verification, the seller can sign in and access their workspace.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After completing registration and verification, the seller signs in and enters their workspace.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The seller can add new products to the marketplace.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can add new products, promote products that are already listed, or communicate with customers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The seller can promote existing products on the platform.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can add new products, promote products that are already listed, or communicate with customers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The seller can communicate with customers through the platform.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can add new products, promote products that are already listed, or communicate with customers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The seller can leave the platform at any time.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After completing any of these activities, the seller continues using the platform from their workspace. The seller can also choose to leave the platform at any time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user must sign in and access a personal dashboard when joining as a customer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the person joins as a customer, they sign in and access their personal dashboard.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The customer can explore products on the platform.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: On the customer side, the customer can explore products, communicate with sellers, report a seller, or share feedback about products.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The customer can search and view available products while browsing.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When browsing products, the customer searches and views available items.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After viewing products, the customer can choose to stop browsing or proceed with a purchase.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After viewing, they may either stop browsing or choose to continue with a purchase.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the customer decides to make a purchase, the selected product is added to their cart and they proceed to checkout.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they decide to continue, the selected product is added and they proceed to checkout.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: During checkout, payment for the purchased item(s) is handled.
The customer can communicate with a seller during their session.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The customer can communicate with a seller and then continue browsing or using other features.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If needed, the customer can report a seller based on previous interactions.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can also communicate with a seller and then continue browsing or using other features. If needed, the customer can report a seller based on previous interactions.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The customer can rate and review products after receiving them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can also rate and review a product after receiving it, and then continue using the platform.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Both the seller and the customer can choose to leave the platform at any time, leading to logging out.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At any point, both the seller and the customer can choose to leave the platform, after which they are logged out.
